events.name: toggle
events.description: Triggered when an accordion item header is clicked; toggles that section open/closed

state.name: openItems
state.description: Which items are expanded; controlled via .is-open on accordion__item. With allowMultiple=false only one can be open.

events.name: dismiss
events.description: Triggered when the close button is clicked (dismissible=true); removes the alert from the DOM

state.description: Display only; no client-side state or events.
Display only; no client-side state or events.

events.name: click
events.description: Native click; use for actions, form submit/reset, or opening dialogs

state.description: Layout only; wraps buttons. No client state; each button handles its own click.

events.name: click
events.description: When interactive=true, card is clickable; handle click on the root element or use as link wrapper

state.description: No internal state; interactive prop adds hover styling and pointer cursor.

events.name: change
events.description: Native change when checked state toggles; use for form binding

state.name: checked
state.description: Controlled via checked prop or form value

events.name: change
events.description: Native change on any child checkbox; parent form or script receives change

state.name: checkedValues
state.description: Values of checked checkboxes; read from form or controlled state

events.name: click
events.description: Chip or remove button click; when removable=true parent typically handles remove

state.name: selected
state.description: Optional selected prop for fill styling; no internal state

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when user selects a date or edits the input

events.name: focus
events.description: Input focus; may open picker depending on implementation

state.name: value
state.description: Selected date value; bound via input value

state.name: pickerOpen
state.description: Whether the date picker popup is open

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when a date is selected

state.name: value
state.description: Selected date

state.name: viewMonth
state.description: Currently displayed month/year in calendar view

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when date or time is selected

state.name: value
state.description: Selected date-time

events.name: close
events.description: Triggered by close button, overlay click, or Escape key

state.name: open
state.description: Controlled via .is-open class on the overlay element

events.name: open
events.description: Triggered when the trigger button is clicked to open the list

events.name: close
events.description: Triggered when an option is selected or focus leaves the dropdown

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when an option is selected; form submits the selected value

state.name: open
state.description: Whether the listbox is expanded (aria-expanded)

state.name: value
state.description: Selected option value; bound via name/value on the hidden input

events.name: click
events.description: Item click for navigation or action

state.name: expanded
state.description: Whether the floating nav is expanded or collapsed (if applicable)
Display only; no client-side state or events.

events.name: change
events.description: Native change when value changes

events.name: focus
events.description: Input received focus

events.name: blur
events.description: Input lost focus

state.name: value
state.description: Current input value; controlled via value prop or form

events.name: click
events.description: Clicks on action buttons, dropdowns, or cards; implement drag/drop in parent if needed

state.description: Column and card data passed as props; reorder/state managed by parent.

events.name: click
events.description: Card or action click; parent handles selection or navigation

state.description: Display only; state managed by parent Kanban or app.
Display only; associates with form control via for attribute.

events.name: click
events.description: Navigation item click; sidebar toggle if present

state.name: collapsed
state.description: Whether sidebar is collapsed (if toggle exists)

events.name: click
events.description: Native click; navigates to href (or preventDefault for SPA)

state.description: No internal state; navigation handled by browser or router.

events.name: click
events.description: Item click; when as='link' navigates, when as='button' use for selection/action

state.name: activeItem
state.description: Optional; indicate active item via items[].active prop

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when a month is selected

state.name: value
state.description: Selected month (e.g. YYYY-MM)
Display only; shows count or dot. Update count via prop.

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when value changes (keyboard or stepper)

state.name: value
state.description: Current numeric value; controlled via value prop or form

events.name: open
events.description: Popup opened

events.name: close
events.description: Popup closed (outside click, Escape, or selection)

state.name: open
state.description: Whether the popup is visible
Display only; progress value set via prop.

events.name: change
events.description: Native change when this option is selected

state.name: checked
state.description: Controlled via checked prop or shared name in RadioGroup

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when selected option changes

state.name: value
state.description: Selected option value; one of the radio values in the group

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when slider value changes

events.name: input
events.description: Fired continuously while dragging

state.name: value
state.description: Current slider value; controlled via value prop or form

events.description: Item click or sidebar toggle

state.name: collapsed

events.description: Clicks on footer links or actions

state.description: Layout slot; no internal state.

events.description: Title, breadcrumb, or action button clicks

events.name: click

state.name: open

Display only; no client-side state or events.

events.name: click
events.description: Step indicator click when stepper is interactive

state.name: status
state.description: completed | current | upcoming; passed from parent Stepper

events.name: stepChange
events.description: When step is clicked; parent controls current step

state.name: currentStep
state.description: Index of current step; controlled by parent

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when user selects a different tab

state.name: activeTab
state.description: Id or index of the active tab; controlled via props or script

events.name: click
events.description: Row or cell clicks; implement sort/select in parent or slots

state.description: Layout only; sort/selection state in parent.

events.description: Native change when value changes

state.name: value

events.name: change

state.name: value
state.description: Selected time

events.name: change
events.description: Native change when the switch is toggled; use for form binding or controlled state

state.name: checked
state.description: Controlled via the checked prop or form value

events.name: hover
events.description: CSS :hover shows tooltip; no JavaScript. Does not work on touch without extra script.

state.name: visible
state.description: Implicit via CSS hover; not controllable in base implementation

state.description: Selected week (e.g. year and week number)
